channel.title: Tarmac on Mizubikes
channel.description: Recent content in Tarmac on Mizubikes

item.title: Specialized Tarmac SL9 Is Official: Here's What Actually Changed
item.description: Specialized has officially launched the S-Works Tarmac SL9, calling it the fastest road bike it's ever made. Here's what's real, what's marketing, and how it stacks up against the SL8.

item.title: Specialized Tarmac SL9: What the Leaks Actually Show
item.description: Leaked images and video of the Specialized Tarmac SL9 have been spreading since May. Here's what the spy shots actually tell us — and what they don't.
